subject: Offer Letter — Software Engineer Meta
body: Please find your offer letter attached. Review and sign by the acceptance deadline.

attachment_texts.offer_letter.pdf:
OFFER LETTER
Position: Software Engineer L4
Company: Meta Platforms Inc
Base Salary: $185,000
RSU: $200,000 over 4 years
Signing Bonus: $20,000
Start Date: June 1, 2026
Offer Expires: April 15, 2026
Acceptance Deadline: April 10, 2026
